overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a compact, warmly lit kitchen interior with retro-futuristic stainless steel appliances and wooden shelving. The character walks the length of the galley kitchen, examines a refrigerator, and returns toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact galley kitchen with stainless steel appliances

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the kitchen counter from the entrance toward the back of the galley

entered.detail: stainless steel gas range with pots on the burners
long metal countertop running along the left wall with various kitchen items
metal frying pans and cookware hanging on the wall above the stove
metal sink basin with faucet at the far end of the counter
vintage-style white refrigerator with chrome handles at the end of the kitchen
tall wooden shelf unit holding bowls and kitchen supplies

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, warmly lit galley kitchen with stainless steel countertops and appliances along the left wall. Wooden shelving units line the right side, and the character moves steadily toward a vintage-style refrigerator at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact galley kitchen with retro refrigerator

events.description: character stops walking and stands facing the refrigerator

agents.ego_description: standing still in front of the refrigerator, examining the appliance and surrounding shelves

entered.detail: metal rack with various containers and kitchen supplies

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the end of the kitchen, facing a vintage white refrigerator. Metal shelving stands to the left while wooden shelves hold ceramic bowls to the right. The character remains stationary, observing the appliances in the warm artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact galley kitchen with storage shelves

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the kitchen entrance

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back through the kitchen toward the entrance doorway

entered.detail: open doorway leading to a dimly lit stone corridor beyond the kitchen

segments.scene_description: The character pivots and walks back through the kitchen, passing the wooden shelving units now on the left. The doorway to an outer hallway becomes visible ahead, while the stainless steel counter runs along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen entrance looking toward stone corridor

events.description: character stops at the kitchen entrance, facing the doorway to the hallway

agents.ego_description: standing at the kitchen threshold looking out into the adjacent stone corridor

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the kitchen entrance, positioned between the wooden shelving and the stainless steel counter, looking out through the doorway into a hazy stone corridor beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warmly lit, retro-futuristic galley kitchen that begins with a deep exploration of the interior and ends with a view toward an outer corridor. It begins as the character walks steadily past stainless steel countertops and wooden shelving toward a vintage-style refrigerator at the far end of the room. Upon reaching the end, the camera pauses to observe the white appliance and surrounding ceramic bowls under the soft artificial light. The character then pivots and retraces their steps, passing the wooden shelves and steel counters in reverse order as the exit comes into view. Finally, the movement stops at the kitchen entrance, shifting the focus from the cozy interior toward a hazy stone corridor beyond the doorway.
